name: X: Open Article
description: Open one X longform `/article/<id>` URL in a fresh tab and return the rendered article body, metadata, and asset URLs. Use for articles specifically — X articles use a different DOM layout from status posts. Do not use for standard post URLs (use `x_open_post`).

browser_automation.description: Opens the article URL in a fresh tab, waits for the article surface to hydrate, then returns structured content + media URLs.

sequences.name: x_open_article
sequences.description: Open an article URL -> wait for the article to hydrate -> return metadata, content HTML, and asset URLs.

required_variables.name: article_url
required_variables.description: Full X article URL to open

steps.name: Open the target article in a fresh tab
Allow the article page to settle
Read the opened article state

help.summary: Open one X longform article URL read-only and return its rendered body and assets.

parameters.name: article_url
parameters.description: Full X article URL of the form https://x.com/<handle>/article/<id>.

examples.description: Fetch one article body, subtitle, author, publish time, images, and external links.

help.returns: { article_url, requested_url, title, subtitle, author, author_handle, published_at, text, article_html, image_urls[], video_urls[], external_links[], asset_urls[], resolved_via }.
notes: Read-only. Never edits or shares the article.
Designed for `/article/<id>` routes only — status posts belong in `x_open_post`.
